texto: It's not that people are mean to each other
autor: it's just that they haven't forgotten the times when being selfless brought them loneliness & pain.
explicacao: Citação de it's just that they haven't forgotten the times when being selfless brought them loneliness & pain. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It's not that people are mean to each other” articula reflexao, saurabh-sharma, people em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
